title: Creamy Spicy Indian Onion Stir-fry
description: This savory and creamy kid-friendly Indian dish is made with shallots, incorporating a tadka for an extra kick of flavor. Halal-friendly.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add coriander, mustard, and cumin seeds; sauté for about 30 seconds.
Add red chili powder and ginger to the pan, stirring continuously for 2 minutes until fragrant but not burnt.
Gradually add onions and shallots to the pan, tossing occasionally to prevent sticking. Cook for 10-15 minutes or until the vegetables are translucent and soft.
Stir in sugar, garam masala, and salt. Continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Pour in coconut milk, stirring constantly to avoid lumps forming. Reduce heat to low and let the mixture simmer for about 5 minutes until slightly thickened.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
